news.title: DigitalOcean Sees Q2 Revenue Growth of About 29%; RPO Expected to Exceed $800 Million
DOCN Stock Climbs On Strong Preliminary Q2 Numbers – CEO Touts Winning ‘World’s Most Sophisticated AI Customers’
DigitalOcean Expects to Report Record Q2 2026 Results with RPO to Exceed $800M, Up More Than 10X Year Over Year
